title: Flooring and Grouting Repair Rehabilitation
intro: Efficient solutions designed to restore and strengthen damaged or worn-out floors and grouted surfaces. By repairing cracks, filling gaps, and enhancing surface durability, these products help extend the life of flooring systems, improve safety, and maintain a polished, long-lasting finish for homes, commercial spaces, and industrial structures.

products.name: Chryso Excem – V1
products.description: Chryso Excem – V1 is a flooring, grouting and repair solution from Ethios that restores surface integrity and delivers lasting durability. Contact our technical team for the data sheet and application guidance.
